# function: op_jsonpath_operand_glob

A JSONPath operand that matches a glob pattern. Intended to be used with the `op_jsonpath` operation.

## Example Usage

```terraform
output "operand" {
  value = provider::sentry::op_jsonpath_operand_glob("pattern-*")
}
```

## Signature

<!-- signature generated by tfplugindocs -->
```text
op_jsonpath_operand_glob(pattern string) string
```

## Arguments

<!-- arguments generated by tfplugindocs -->
1. `pattern` (String) The glob pattern to match.
